body: Dear IT, I am writing to request a password reset. I have forgotten my password and am unable to access the system. Can you please assist me with this? I would appreciate it if you could also provide me with instructions on how to change my password. Thank you for your time. Best, Olivia Martin
subject: Routine Password Reset

body: Dear Customer Service, I am writing to request a refund for my recent purchase. I am not satisfied with the product and would like to return it. Can you please let me know the next steps? I have attached a copy of my receipt to this email. Please note that this email is confidential and should not be shared with anyone. Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter. Best, Charlotte Harris. Confidentiality Disclaimer: This email is intended only for the use of the individual or entity to which it is addressed and may contain confidential and/or privileged information.
subject: Angry Client Refund

body: Dear Team, I am writing to inform you that our server is currently down. We are working to resolve the issue as quickly as possible. In the meantime, please try to avoid using the system. I will keep you updated on the status. Thank you for your patience. Best, William White. Sent from my iPhone
subject: VIP Server Outage

body: Dear Team, I am writing to inquire about your company. I am interested in learning more about your products and services. Can you please send me some information? I would appreciate it if you could also let me know about any job openings. Thank you for your time. Best, Amanda Davis
subject: General Inquiry

body: Dear Friend, I am writing to inform you of an amazing opportunity to make money fast! All you need to do is click on the link below and follow the instructions. You will be rich in no time! Don't miss out on this incredible chance. Best, Spam Bot
subject: Make Money Fast!

body: Dear Accounting, I am writing to inform you of a discrepancy in my recent invoice. I was charged for a product that I did not order. Can you please look into this and correct the issue? I have attached a copy of the invoice to this email. Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter. Best, Sophia Lee
subject: Invoice Discrepancy

body: Dear HR, I am writing to inform you of a sensitive issue that requires your attention. I have been experiencing harassment in the workplace and would like to request your assistance in resolving the matter. Please keep this email confidential. Thank you for your understanding. Best, Jackson Brown. Confidentiality Disclaimer: This email is intended only for the use of the individual or entity to which it is addressed and may contain confidential and/or privileged information.
subject: HR Sensitive Information

body: Dear User, I am writing to inform you that your account has been compromised. Please click on the link below to reset your password. If you do not reset your password, your account will be deleted. Best, Emily Patel
subject: Phishing Attempt

body: Dear Development Team, I am writing to request a new feature for your product. I would like to be able to customize the layout of the dashboard. Can you please let me know if this is something that can be implemented? I would appreciate it if you could also provide a timeline for when this feature will be available. Thank you for your time. Best, Michael Kim
subject: Feature Request
